title: Arcwell Modular Desk Lamp Landing Page
topic: Build a premium product landing page for a modular desk lamp called Arcwell.
prompt: Build a premium product landing page for Arcwell, a modular desk lamp with swappable arms, lenses, and base finishes. The page should feel like a refined product site with a strong first-viewport product signal, product imagery or a generated product visual, concise specifications, configuration controls, and a buying call to action. Avoid beige craft defaults and generic feature-card layouts.
successCriteria: The first viewport clearly shows or evokes the Arcwell lamp.
Configuration or product-detail controls are understandable and accessible.
The palette and typography feel premium without generic beige and brass styling.
Responsive layout has no text overlap or horizontal overflow.
